name: Westerly Virtual Golf
about: Westerly Virtual Golf provides a year-round indoor golf experience in a climate-controlled facility. The venue features TruGolf Vista 12 Golf Simulators with 165-inch full-sized wide impact screens and high-definition graphics. Over 50 golf courses from around the world are available for play, utilizing E6 Connect software that allows for online tournaments and head-to-head challenges. In addition to golf, the facility offers motion racing simulators with 3-dimensional movement for racing enthusiasts.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 50 world-famous golf courses
TruGolf Vista 12 simulators with 165" impact screens
Motion racing simulators for added entertainment
Private event hosting and birthday parties
Junior golf lessons and league play available

food_and_drink.notes: Catering available for parties; mentions of Moe's Southwest Grill.

simulator_hardware.notes: 165" full-sized wide impact screen, 3 rows of optical sensors

amenities_list: Motion Racing Simulators|Arcade Games|Private Events|BYOB|Chipping Nets|Live Sports Broadcasts|Junior Golf Programs

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue features a consignment shop for new and used equipment, and while they have everything you need to get golfing, you can bring your own set.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is an approved BYOB (Bring Your Own Beer/Wine) facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes approximately 1 hour per player to complete 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers birthday parties, arcade games, junior golf lessons, and specific 'Teen Night Events' with adult supervision.
